use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyvirtualdisplay because Python wrapper for Xvfb, Xephyr and Xvnc.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyvirtualdisplay as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyvirtualdisplay with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyvirtualdisplay --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
